_comment: Copy this file to config.json. On a live server, install.sh places it at /etc/conduit-cc/config.json. Do not store secrets here — secrets belong in .env. Log level (LOG_LEVEL) is also in .env, not here.

conduit._comment_metrics_port: metrics_port must match --metrics-addr in /etc/systemd/system/conduit.service. Default: 127.0.0.1:9090 (loopback only). Change both together or metrics will not work.
conduit._comment_bandwidth_max_mbps: M2 config write: soft upper bound for the editable bandwidth value (Mbps). Must match BW_MAX in deployment/bin/ccc-apply-conduit-config. -1 = unlimited; default 1000.

traffic._comment: Persistent traffic accounting collector. Ship-dark: disabled by default. Set collector_enabled to true to begin recording Conduit byte counters into ccc.db. Aggregate-only; no per-user data. Safe to leave disabled.

advisor._comment: Contribution Advisor warm-up and sampling knobs. Read-only, aggregate-only guidance; safe to leave at defaults. sample_throttle_seconds should be <= the dashboard poll interval (60s) so the warm-up buffer fills while the Dashboard is open. Growth suggestions require growth_min_samples taken over at least growth_min_span_seconds, with growth_sample_pass_fraction of them inside resource headroom.
